TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pyanan, title = Pyanan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pyanan} }

S.FORM: Pyanan qalang Pyanan hya ga cyux beh girang keng Raytogo Pyanan song. lalu' Pyanan qani hya ga aring nkis raral lga maki qu lalu qani hya la. osa beh qalang myan hya ga, aring Girang ga pwah beh Yuensan ru htu Galang Syanoh, ruw kura beh qalang myan, qutux tuqiy hya ga pwah beh Gyuto ruw pwah hongu tayal ruw p'ubuy tuqiy Bongbong lru mwah qalang myan la. kinwagiq niya ga wal hazi 1200 meta , qalang Pyanan hya ga cyux maki puqing balay llyung mnibu, kincingay squliq niya ga 834 kwara, 249 qu ngasal cyux maki kya. kinlabang hyal nya ga 86.54 pinxwang kungli. mrhuw balay nkis myan hya ga kmomaw muci qu piqyuwan nkis myan. iyat mnwah inu ma, aring pinsbkan lga yasa siy kaki sa hyal qani muci pinqyuwan nkis myan. balay balay hyal myan kya, ruw mkhway kwara qu squliq myan kya, ini phakas, mrraw uzi kya qu pcyagun naha. misu qani lga giway muya tmana' ru rramat ana nanu qu cyux naha sqyanux. cyux maki te inu qu qalang部落位置與概況 sami qalang Pyanan hiya ga, cyux maki son maha kraya balay son maha 'tunux balay son llyung i Mnibu qani, cyux maki Yahu Quri' sqabu qalang myan qani. ro qalang mu qani hiya ga,sraral ha ga, yasa qa qnxan ta sraral laga, muya sami trakis ngahi yasa qu wa sqyanux i pqyanux sami, babaw nya lga, qyopan sami son maha kahat qani lga, maras son maha i tamana qani la, mwah qalang myan laga, muya tamana qa i kahat laga psulung sami kya sami qalang myan uyi ro, nanu misuw qani lga, qwara qalang myan ga, cyux muya i tamana qwara misuw qani lga. lalu i qalang myan i pyanan qani ga, ini ptnaq qa son maha i ziray nya wayal ga zikang nya ga ini ptnaq qa son maha lalu nya qalang qani uyi, taring balay mwah i qalang myan qani kahul i quri' sqabu mwah i thazi son maha qalang pyanan qani ga, taring balay kian naha ga, Sgmi son Sgmi qasa ga, cyux maki llyung Memutang, ro nqa i gong kahul qa sgalup qasa Sgmi son nya, baha ini say Sgmi ga, piyux balay son maha qutux khoniq Sgmi kya sraral ma, Sgmi qani ga, baqun i awa ga i niwan ma seken ta misuw qani baqun i mima he uyi, baqun i mahoq lukus uyi ga, ro babw nya lga, kahul sgmi qasa khmay khmay laqi naha lga, ini ktnq kian lga, mwah kya i Pyanan la, ana ga mwah i Pyanan ga, ini say Pyanan na, Mnibu' so na, ro imi nqa Mnibu' qani, swa son maha Mnibu qani mga, saying qa i kinholan ke qani ma ga, qutux hiya ga, q'sun balay mu syax wagi ma ga, nanu ya son maha Mnibu' ma, ro qutux loyi ga, rgyax qwara lingay nya ma ga, qalang qani ma, pira balay qutux libu biyok i qalang qani maha, nanu Mnibu' son naha, ro babaw nya lga, mwah i kyopan sami Gipun la, mwah Gipun lga Pyanan son nya la. ana ga Pyanan qani ga, iyat cinlalu Gipun ga, pnongan nya i qalang myan maha Pyanan lalu qalang nya qani, nanu Gipun ga Pyanan son nya, puqing balay imi nya Pyanan qani ma ga, sami Pyanan hiya qani ma ga, mhuway balay ma, nanu kahul Sqoyaw ini ga, Slamaw squliq ma ga, musa i mkan mtswe naha kya Skikun ini ga Lmwan mga, sqa wagi lga, hminas qalang nyan wa sraral ungat i turuy lngan ta rwa, si ta sinkakay ma mhkangi nanu sasal kahul kya i Sqoyaw lga, mwah i qalang myan lga, sqa wagi lga, m'uyay ktu naha la, muyay ktu naha lga, blaq balay qa mhuway balay qalang nyan qani, nanu i tpihun naha ro, mwah muyaw, kya su lu'u moyay la, anay misu phapuy,〝pyanay misu cikah〞, nanu Pyanan qani lga, kahul pyanay misu qani lga, kahul kya ga, lalu ni ga, kahul ke qani maha pyanay misu qani, nanu Pyanan son la. wiwal nqu wal maku skayal sa sinllwan na qalang muci, ru nyux maki smryut te yahu qani: bnkis myan sraral ga minkahul squ Pinsbkan ru pgagay squ Quri sqabu muyaw squ Turuy kacing ru tehuk squ Hbun qyus ki gong Matang suruw nya lga tehuk squ hbun Talah (又稱sgmi), maki uzi qu wal mkura sa Mnoyan uzi. Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -沿著Turuy kacing 山背下切-經Hbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (又稱sgmi) ,有一部分的人前往Mnoyan . 1.qalang nguhu 2.qalang rgyax,近代Watan ali 頭目又從中分離出 3.qalang kska, 另外,園建社於gong Mekyup 溪畔的qalang Yuqu qalang qnapan,至此Pyanan . kinhmayan na ssquliq人口概況 squliq Pyanan nyan ga, misuw qani ga,kya i kinniks ro laqi squnun ga,kya i qutux seng squliq i qalang myan hiya,ro kneril ga piyux hayiy,paying kusa kya mlikuy tkkwaw rwa ro,nanu wa i mhokil lga,ro ruma ga m'uy naha i sraral musa qmalu,ini ga musa mnayang qmayah ro nanu ini tl'ux son maha qnxan naha mlikuy,nanu kneril hiya ga,nanu i bsyaq hayiy qnhun naha ya. galang myan hiya ga,maki son maha i aring sraral haga,cyugan kyokay nya ha ga,qutux ga Cyoro kyokay(kiriskyo) son nya,ro tesinkyo ga,ro babaw nya la,mwah qutux hariluya son nya,mwah hasa uyi la,ro babaw nya lga,hmku hmku kya naha nulu inu qa i rwa naha i snhyan naha ni ga,htux qa 摩門教uyi la,maki摩門教,ro nya mwah 曠野協會uyi la,nanu magan kyokay laro,smisuw qani lga,kahat lga,kbalay qutux 媽祖廟 uyi la,nanu son hani mita lga,piyux balay kyokay ga. sami galang Pyanan qani hiya ga,taring sraral balay ha ga,nanu I trakis ru ngahi qani muyan myan ga,wali birun ala ro trasis ro ngahi niqun ta nanaq ro ga,babaw nya laga,taring maki cikay i miyup son naha qeqaya kmukan kahat qani la,nanu si ga birun pila laro,nanu yasa lga qalang myan ga,musa i tmyase son lga,musa rgyax ro musa hnkangi khoniq i mistmaq ro scinun naha ro hmku nqa tqenux la,ro babaw nya lga muya sami yorin la,ro muya sami labin,baqun mayi uyi ga,baqun mepila,kya minkoku rokuyu nanneng lga,taring sami tmalang sami muya qanrang la,muya ta qanrang la,ana cami muya qarang ga,nanu i ini kpiyux ro qmayah sraral iway haga ro,nanu iyaw iyaw iyaw haga spmiyon ini kpiyux,kyan minkoku nanaq yo nannng lga,mwah kahat la,maras 怪手 laro,nanu i sbnhu qwara i mayah nyan laro,miyan naha qarang lga,yasa qa i pira misuw qani piyux balay son maha qalang i qalang myan qani,nanu ana ski misuw qani na ga,qalang myan ga,yasa qa muya qarang maha i sqynux i goyu neng qani ga,nanu qa muya qarang. . osa squ qalang部落交通 Qalang myan qani ga,cyan maki i tunux son maha llyung Mnibu' qani,nanu yasa i kmuyit su turuy kahul i hogan ga kahul heci mwah ga,si glux i son maha syaw llyung i Mnibu' qani,nanu si prkyas prkyas ro,mwah Lmwan laro,prkyas lga Skikun lga,yasa mwah Pyanah la.ana ga saying qara tuqiy nya ga,myuqu su musa lga,phtux su Toyen ro ini ga musa su 太平山ga,cyux qutux Pekus son naha ga,wa prkyas ga qutux tuqiy ga,wa kya Toyen ga,ro mwah laga,te Thbu son naha Roba ga,cyux qutux tuqiy loyiwa tqara loyi wal 太平山 la,nanu yasa min'uqu su mlux tuqiy qasa laga,iyat su tehok Pyanan la. Sami qalang Pyanan qani huya ga,bahaw cyux maki son maha i suru balay rgyax ga,piyux balay son maha i blaq chalan ga,ro balaq nayan uyi,pira maha sami qalang Pyanan qani ga,cyux qutux son maha quri sqabu,quri sqabu qasa hiya ga,bagan ro kmisan ro tmangu abaw ro hoqan abaw ga,ini ptnaq qwara kako nya ga,blaq balay ktan ga,quri' sqabu qasa hiya ga,taring sraral ga,yasa niqan nyan i galan myan i quilh ga,quilh hasa ga,mnbang so nyan ga櫻花鉤吻鮭,nanu sraral ga,yasa galan myamn qulih,ro qalang myan hasa ga,maki balung uyi ga,maki son maha qaling son nyan ga,nanu cyux qutux son 檜木園區,cyux qutux步道ga,okeq musa mangay qa i qaling,ro qalang myan hasa ga,cyux maki qutux son maha mqabu n ptunux cyux kya uyi,blaq balay ktan 鐘乳石qasa ay,ana ga mwani ga,cyux shtux i kensexu ga,nyux shtuy maha ta say nqa i pcyaqih i 鐘乳石 qasa,misuw qani ga,ini baqiy musa haya,ro qutux loyi hapa balay ga i觀光nya lga,qanrang qani ro,qalang Pyanan qani ga,ita Taywan qani ga,si say ma hopa balay qa 菜區nya ga,mmiyan qanrang qani,nanu musa su qalang Pyanan qani ga,ktan su qwara mtasyeq qwara i qanrang ga,blaq balay ktan.khmay balay i kahat ga. tay mkraya' na Pyanan hya' ga Qalang skikun. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

Pyanan qalang Pyanan hya ga cyux beh girang keng Raytogo Pyanan song. lalu' Pyanan qani hya ga aring nkis raral lga maki qu lalu qani hya la. osa beh qalang myan hya ga, aring Girang ga pwah beh Yuensan ru htu Galang Syanoh, ruw kura beh qalang myan, qutux tuqiy hya ga pwah beh Gyuto ruw pwah hongu tayal ruw p'ubuy tuqiy Bongbong lru mwah qalang myan la. kinwagiq niya ga wal hazi 1200 meta , qalang Pyanan hya ga cyux maki puqing balay llyung mnibu, kincingay squliq niya ga 834 kwara, 249 qu ngasal cyux maki kya. kinlabang hyal nya ga 86.54 pinxwang kungli. mrhuw balay nkis myan hya ga kmomaw muci qu piqyuwan nkis myan. iyat mnwah inu ma, aring pinsbkan lga yasa siy kaki sa hyal qani muci pinqyuwan nkis myan. balay balay hyal myan kya, ruw mkhway kwara qu squliq myan kya, ini phakas, mrraw uzi kya qu pcyagun naha. misu qani lga giway muya tmana' ru rramat ana nanu qu cyux naha sqyanux. cyux maki te inu qu qalang部落位置與概況 sami qalang Pyanan hiya ga, cyux maki son maha kraya balay son maha 'tunux balay son llyung i Mnibu qani, cyux maki Yahu Quri' sqabu qalang myan qani. ro qalang mu qani hiya ga,sraral ha ga, yasa qa qnxan ta sraral laga, muya sami trakis ngahi yasa qu wa sqyanux i pqyanux sami, babaw nya lga, qyopan sami son maha kahat qani lga, maras son maha i tamana qani la, mwah qalang myan laga, muya tamana qa i kahat laga psulung sami kya sami qalang myan uyi ro, nanu misuw qani lga, qwara qalang myan ga, cyux muya i tamana qwara misuw qani lga. lalu i qalang myan i pyanan qani ga, ini ptnaq qa son maha i ziray nya wayal ga zikang nya ga ini ptnaq qa son maha lalu nya qalang qani uyi, taring balay mwah i qalang myan qani kahul i quri' sqabu mwah i thazi son maha qalang pyanan qani ga, taring balay kian naha ga, Sgmi son Sgmi qasa ga, cyux maki llyung Memutang, ro nqa i gong kahul qa sgalup qasa Sgmi son nya, baha ini say Sgmi ga, piyux balay son maha qutux khoniq Sgmi kya sraral ma, Sgmi qani ga, baqun i awa ga i niwan ma seken ta misuw qani baqun i mima he uyi, baqun i mahoq lukus uyi ga, ro babw nya lga, kahul sgmi qasa khmay khmay laqi naha lga, ini ktnq kian lga, mwah kya i Pyanan la, ana ga mwah i Pyanan ga, ini say Pyanan na, Mnibu' so na, ro imi nqa Mnibu' qani, swa son maha Mnibu qani mga, saying qa i kinholan ke qani ma ga, qutux hiya ga, q'sun balay mu syax wagi ma ga, nanu ya son maha Mnibu' ma, ro qutux loyi ga, rgyax qwara lingay nya ma ga, qalang qani ma, pira balay qutux libu biyok i qalang qani maha, nanu Mnibu' son naha, ro babaw nya lga, mwah i kyopan sami Gipun la, mwah Gipun lga Pyanan son nya la. ana ga Pyanan qani ga, iyat cinlalu Gipun ga, pnongan nya i qalang myan maha Pyanan lalu qalang nya qani, nanu Gipun ga Pyanan son nya, puqing balay imi nya Pyanan qani ma ga, sami Pyanan hiya qani ma ga, mhuway balay ma, nanu kahul Sqoyaw ini ga, Slamaw squliq ma ga, musa i mkan mtswe naha kya Skikun ini ga Lmwan mga, sqa wagi lga, hminas qalang nyan wa sraral ungat i turuy lngan ta rwa, si ta sinkakay ma mhkangi nanu sasal kahul kya i Sqoyaw lga, mwah i qalang myan lga, sqa wagi lga, m'uyay ktu naha la, muyay ktu naha lga, blaq balay qa mhuway balay qalang nyan qani, nanu i tpihun naha ro, mwah muyaw, kya su lu'u moyay la, anay misu phapuy,〝pyanay misu cikah〞, nanu Pyanan qani lga, kahul pyanay misu qani lga, kahul kya ga, lalu ni ga, kahul ke qani maha pyanay misu qani, nanu Pyanan son la. wiwal nqu wal maku skayal sa sinllwan na qalang muci, ru nyux maki smryut te yahu qani: bnkis myan sraral ga minkahul squ Pinsbkan ru pgagay squ Quri sqabu muyaw squ Turuy kacing ru tehuk squ Hbun qyus ki gong Matang suruw nya lga tehuk squ hbun Talah (又稱sgmi), maki uzi qu wal mkura sa Mnoyan uzi. Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -沿著Turuy kacing 山背下切-經Hbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (又稱sgmi) ,有一部分的人前往Mnoyan . 1.qalang nguhu 2.qalang rgyax,近代Watan ali 頭目又從中分離出 3.qalang kska, 另外,園建社於gong Mekyup 溪畔的qalang Yuqu qalang qnapan,至此Pyanan . kinhmayan na ssquliq人口概況 squliq Pyanan nyan ga, misuw qani ga,kya i kinniks ro laqi squnun ga,kya i qutux seng squliq i qalang myan hiya,ro kneril ga piyux hayiy,paying kusa kya mlikuy tkkwaw rwa ro,nanu wa i mhokil lga,ro ruma ga m'uy naha i sraral musa qmalu,ini ga musa mnayang qmayah ro nanu ini tl'ux son maha qnxan naha mlikuy,nanu kneril hiya ga,nanu i bsyaq hayiy qnhun naha ya. galang myan hiya ga,maki son maha i aring sraral haga,cyugan kyokay nya ha ga,qutux ga Cyoro kyokay(kiriskyo) son nya,ro tesinkyo ga,ro babaw nya la,mwah qutux hariluya son nya,mwah hasa uyi la,ro babaw nya lga,hmku hmku kya naha nulu inu qa i rwa naha i snhyan naha ni ga,htux qa 摩門教uyi la,maki摩門教,ro nya mwah 曠野協會uyi la,nanu magan kyokay laro,smisuw qani lga,kahat lga,kbalay qutux 媽祖廟 uyi la,nanu son hani mita lga,piyux balay kyokay ga. sami galang Pyanan qani hiya ga,taring sraral balay ha ga,nanu I trakis ru ngahi qani muyan myan ga,wali birun ala ro trasis ro ngahi niqun ta nanaq ro ga,babaw nya laga,taring maki cikay i miyup son naha qeqaya kmukan kahat qani la,nanu si ga birun pila laro,nanu yasa lga qalang myan ga,musa i tmyase son lga,musa rgyax ro musa hnkangi khoniq i mistmaq ro scinun naha ro hmku nqa tqenux la,ro babaw nya lga muya sami yorin la,ro muya sami labin,baqun mayi uyi ga,baqun mepila,kya minkoku rokuyu nanneng lga,taring sami tmalang sami muya qanrang la,muya ta qanrang la,ana cami muya qarang ga,nanu i ini kpiyux ro qmayah sraral iway haga ro,nanu iyaw iyaw iyaw haga spmiyon ini kpiyux,kyan minkoku nanaq yo nannng lga,mwah kahat la,maras 怪手 laro,nanu i sbnhu qwara i mayah nyan laro,miyan naha qarang lga,yasa qa i pira misuw qani piyux balay son maha qalang i qalang myan qani,nanu ana ski misuw qani na ga,qalang myan ga,yasa qa muya qarang maha i sqynux i goyu neng qani ga,nanu qa muya qarang. . osa squ qalang部落交通 Qalang myan qani ga,cyan maki i tunux son maha llyung Mnibu' qani,nanu yasa i kmuyit su turuy kahul i hogan ga kahul heci mwah ga,si glux i son maha syaw llyung i Mnibu' qani,nanu si prkyas prkyas ro,mwah Lmwan laro,prkyas lga Skikun lga,yasa mwah Pyanah la.ana ga saying qara tuqiy nya ga,myuqu su musa lga,phtux su Toyen ro ini ga musa su 太平山ga,cyux qutux Pekus son naha ga,wa prkyas ga qutux tuqiy ga,wa kya Toyen ga,ro mwah laga,te Thbu son naha Roba ga,cyux qutux tuqiy loyiwa tqara loyi wal 太平山 la,nanu yasa min'uqu su mlux tuqiy qasa laga,iyat su tehok Pyanan la. Sami qalang Pyanan qani huya ga,bahaw cyux maki son maha i suru balay rgyax ga,piyux balay son maha i blaq chalan ga,ro balaq nayan uyi,pira maha sami qalang Pyanan qani ga,cyux qutux son maha quri sqabu,quri sqabu qasa hiya ga,bagan ro kmisan ro tmangu abaw ro hoqan abaw ga,ini ptnaq qwara kako nya ga,blaq balay ktan ga,quri' sqabu qasa hiya ga,taring sraral ga,yasa niqan nyan i galan myan i quilh ga,quilh hasa ga,mnbang so nyan ga櫻花鉤吻鮭,nanu sraral ga,yasa galan myamn qulih,ro qalang myan hasa ga,maki balung uyi ga,maki son maha qaling son nyan ga,nanu cyux qutux son 檜木園區,cyux qutux步道ga,okeq musa mangay qa i qaling,ro qalang myan hasa ga,cyux maki qutux son maha mqabu n ptunux cyux kya uyi,blaq balay ktan 鐘乳石qasa ay,ana ga mwani ga,cyux shtux i kensexu ga,nyux shtuy maha ta say nqa i pcyaqih i 鐘乳石 qasa,misuw qani ga,ini baqiy musa haya,ro qutux loyi hapa balay ga i觀光nya lga,qanrang qani ro,qalang Pyanan qani ga,ita Taywan qani ga,si say ma hopa balay qa 菜區nya ga,mmiyan qanrang qani,nanu musa su qalang Pyanan qani ga,ktan su qwara mtasyeq qwara i qanrang ga,blaq balay ktan.khmay balay i kahat ga. tay mkraya' na Pyanan hya' ga Qalang skikun. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: pjanan qalaŋ pjanan ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux βeħ ɣiraŋ keŋ rajtoɣo pjanan s~ɕoŋ. laluʔ pjanan qani ħja ɣa ariŋ nkis~ɕ raral lɣa maki qu lalu qani ħja la. os~ɕa βeħ qalaŋ mjan ħja ɣa, ariŋ ɣiraŋ ɣa pwaħ βeħ juens~ɕan ru ħtu ɣalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ, ruw kura βeħ qalaŋ mjan, qutux tuqij ħja ɣa pwaħ βeħ ɣjuto ruw pwaħ ħoŋu tajal ruw pʔuβuj tuqij βoŋβoŋ lru mwaħ qalaŋ mjan la. kinwaɣiq nija ɣa wal ħazi **** meta , qalaŋ pjanan ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki puqiŋ βalaj lljuŋ mniβu, kinʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq nija ɣa *** kwara, *** qu ŋas~ɕal ʦ~ʨjux maki kja. kinlaβaŋ ħjal nja ɣa **.** pinxwaŋ kuŋli. mrħuw βalaj nkis~ɕ mjan ħja ɣa kmomaw muʦ~ʨi qu piqjuwan nkis~ɕ mjan. ijat mnwaħ inu ma, ariŋ pins~ɕβkan lɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕij kaki s~ɕa ħjal qani muʦ~ʨi pinqjuwan nkis~ɕ mjan. βalaj βalaj ħjal mjan kja, ruw mkħwaj kwara qu s~ɕquliq mjan kja, ini pħakas~ɕ, mrraw uzi kja qu pʦ~ʨjaɣun naħa. mis~ɕu qani lɣa ɣiwaj muja tmanaʔ ru rramat ana nanu qu ʦ~ʨjux naħa s~ɕqjanux. ʦ~ʨjux maki te inu qu qalaŋ******* s~ɕami qalaŋ pjanan ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕon maħa kraja βalaj s~ɕon maħa ʔtunux βalaj s~ɕon lljuŋ i mniβu qani, ʦ~ʨjux maki jaħu quriʔ s~ɕqaβu qalaŋ mjan qani. ro qalaŋ mu qani ħija ɣa,s~ɕraral ħa ɣa, jas~ɕa qa qnxan ta s~ɕraral laɣa, muja s~ɕami trakis~ɕ ŋaħi jas~ɕa qu wa s~ɕqjanux i pqjanux s~ɕami, βaβaw nja lɣa, qjopan s~ɕami s~ɕon maħa kaħat qani lɣa, maras~ɕ s~ɕon maħa i tamana qani la, mwaħ qalaŋ mjan laɣa, muja tamana qa i kaħat laɣa ps~ɕuluŋ s~ɕami kja s~ɕami qalaŋ mjan uji ro, nanu mis~ɕuw qani lɣa, qwara qalaŋ mjan ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux muja i tamana qwara mis~ɕuw qani lɣa. lalu i qalaŋ mjan i pjanan qani ɣa, ini ptnaq qa s~ɕon maħa i ziraj nja wajal ɣa zikaŋ nja ɣa ini ptnaq qa s~ɕon maħa lalu nja qalaŋ qani uji, tariŋ βalaj mwaħ i qalaŋ mjan qani kaħul i quriʔ s~ɕqaβu mwaħ i tħazi s~ɕon maħa qalaŋ pjanan qani ɣa, tariŋ βalaj kian naħa ɣa, s~ɕɣmi s~ɕon s~ɕɣmi qas~ɕa ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki lljuŋ memutaŋ, ro nqa i ɣoŋ kaħul qa s~ɕɣalup qas~ɕa s~ɕɣmi s~ɕon nja, βaħa ini s~ɕaj s~ɕɣmi ɣa, pijux βalaj s~ɕon maħa qutux kħoniq s~ɕɣmi kja s~ɕraral ma, s~ɕɣmi qani ɣa, βaqun i awa ɣa i niwan ma s~ɕeken ta mis~ɕuw qani βaqun i mima ħe uji, βaqun i maħoq lukus~ɕ uji ɣa, ro βaβw nja lɣa, kaħul s~ɕɣmi qas~ɕa kħmaj kħmaj laqi naħa lɣa, ini ktnq kian lɣa, mwaħ kja i pjanan la, ana ɣa mwaħ i pjanan ɣa, ini s~ɕaj pjanan na, mniβuʔ s~ɕo na, ro imi nqa mniβuʔ qani, s~ɕwa s~ɕon maħa mniβu qani mɣa, s~ɕajiŋ qa i kinħolan ke qani ma ɣa, qutux ħija ɣa, qʔs~ɕun βalaj mu s~ɕjax waɣi ma ɣa, nanu ja s~ɕon maħa mniβuʔ ma, ro qutux loji ɣa, rɣjax qwara liŋaj nja ma ɣa, qalaŋ qani ma, pira βalaj qutux liβu βijok i qalaŋ qani maħa, nanu mniβuʔ s~ɕon naħa, ro βaβaw nja lɣa, mwaħ i kjopan s~ɕami ɣipun la, mwaħ ɣipun lɣa pjanan s~ɕon nja la. ana ɣa pjanan qani ɣa, ijat ʦ~ʨinlalu ɣipun ɣa, pnoŋan nja i qalaŋ mjan maħa pjanan lalu qalaŋ nja qani, nanu ɣipun ɣa pjanan s~ɕon nja, puqiŋ βalaj imi nja pjanan qani ma ɣa, s~ɕami pjanan ħija qani ma ɣa, mħuwaj βalaj ma, nanu kaħul s~ɕqojaw ini ɣa, s~ɕlamaw s~ɕquliq ma ɣa, mus~ɕa i mkan mts~ɕwe naħa kja s~ɕkikun ini ɣa lmwan mɣa, s~ɕqa waɣi lɣa, ħminas~ɕ qalaŋ njan wa s~ɕraral uŋat i turuj lŋan ta rwa, s~ɕi ta s~ɕinkakaj ma mħkaŋi nanu s~ɕas~ɕal kaħul kja i s~ɕqojaw lɣa, mwaħ i qalaŋ mjan lɣa, s~ɕqa waɣi lɣa, mʔujaj ktu naħa la, mujaj ktu naħa lɣa, βlaq βalaj qa mħuwaj βalaj qalaŋ njan qani, nanu i tpiħun naħa ro, mwaħ mujaw, kja s~ɕu luʔu mojaj la, anaj mis~ɕu pħapuj,*pjanaj mis~ɕu ʦ~ʨikaħ*, nanu pjanan qani lɣa, kaħul pjanaj mis~ɕu qani lɣa, kaħul kja ɣa, lalu ni ɣa, kaħul ke qani maħa pjanaj mis~ɕu qani, nanu pjanan s~ɕon la. wiwal nqu wal maku s~ɕkajal s~ɕa s~ɕinllwan na qalaŋ muʦ~ʨi, ru njux maki s~ɕmrjut te jaħu qani: βnkis~ɕ mjan s~ɕraral ɣa minkaħul s~ɕqu pins~ɕβkan ru pɣaɣaj s~ɕqu quri s~ɕqaβu mujaw s~ɕqu turuj kaʦ~ʨiŋ ru teħuk s~ɕqu ħβun qjus~ɕ ki ɣoŋ mataŋ s~ɕuruw nja lɣa teħuk s~ɕqu ħβun talaħ (**s~ɕɣmi), maki uzi qu wal mkura s~ɕa mnojan uzi. pins~ɕβkan -quri s~ɕqaβu -**turuj kaʦ~ʨiŋ ****-*ħβun qjus~ɕ -ɣoŋ mataŋ -ħβun talaħ (**s~ɕɣmi) ,********mnojan . *.qalaŋ ŋuħu *.qalaŋ rɣjax,**watan ali ******** *.qalaŋ ks~ɕka, **,****ɣoŋ mekjup ***qalaŋ juqu qalaŋ qnapan,**pjanan . kinħmajan na s~ɕs~ɕquliq**** s~ɕquliq pjanan njan ɣa, mis~ɕuw qani ɣa,kja i kinniks~ɕ ro laqi s~ɕqunun ɣa,kja i qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕquliq i qalaŋ mjan ħija,ro kneril ɣa pijux ħajij,pajiŋ kus~ɕa kja mlikuj tkkwaw rwa ro,nanu wa i mħokil lɣa,ro ruma ɣa mʔuj naħa i s~ɕraral mus~ɕa qmalu,ini ɣa mus~ɕa mnajaŋ qmajaħ ro nanu ini tlʔux s~ɕon maħa qnxan naħa mlikuj,nanu kneril ħija ɣa,nanu i βs~ɕjaq ħajij qnħun naħa ja. ɣalaŋ mjan ħija ɣa,maki s~ɕon maħa i ariŋ s~ɕraral ħaɣa,ʦ~ʨjuɣan kjokaj nja ħa ɣa,qutux ɣa ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj(kiris~ɕkjo) s~ɕon nja,ro tes~ɕinkjo ɣa,ro βaβaw nja la,mwaħ qutux ħariluja s~ɕon nja,mwaħ ħas~ɕa uji la,ro βaβaw nja lɣa,ħmku ħmku kja naħa nulu inu qa i rwa naħa i s~ɕnħjan naħa ni ɣa,ħtux qa ***uji la,maki***,ro nja mwaħ ****uji la,nanu maɣan kjokaj laro,s~ɕmis~ɕuw qani lɣa,kaħat lɣa,kβalaj qutux *** uji la,nanu s~ɕon ħani mita lɣa,pijux βalaj kjokaj ɣa. s~ɕami ɣalaŋ pjanan qani ħija ɣa,tariŋ s~ɕraral βalaj ħa ɣa,nanu i trakis~ɕ ru ŋaħi qani mujan mjan ɣa,wali βirun ala ro tras~ɕis~ɕ ro ŋaħi niqun ta nanaq ro ɣa,βaβaw nja laɣa,tariŋ maki ʦ~ʨikaj i mijup s~ɕon naħa qeqaja kmukan kaħat qani la,nanu s~ɕi ɣa βirun pila laro,nanu jas~ɕa lɣa qalaŋ mjan ɣa,mus~ɕa i tmjas~ɕe s~ɕon lɣa,mus~ɕa rɣjax ro mus~ɕa ħnkaŋi kħoniq i mis~ɕtmaq ro s~ɕʦ~ʨinun naħa ro ħmku nqa tqenux la,ro βaβaw nja lɣa muja s~ɕami jorin la,ro muja s~ɕami laβin,βaqun maji uji ɣa,βaqun mepila,kja minkoku rokuju nanneŋ lɣa,tariŋ s~ɕami tmalaŋ s~ɕami muja qanraŋ la,muja ta qanraŋ la,ana ʦ~ʨami muja qaraŋ ɣa,nanu i ini kpijux ro qmajaħ s~ɕraral iwaj ħaɣa ro,nanu ijaw ijaw ijaw ħaɣa s~ɕpmijon ini kpijux,kjan minkoku nanaq jo nannŋ lɣa,mwaħ kaħat la,maras~ɕ ** laro,nanu i s~ɕβnħu qwara i majaħ njan laro,mijan naħa qaraŋ lɣa,jas~ɕa qa i pira mis~ɕuw qani pijux βalaj s~ɕon maħa qalaŋ i qalaŋ mjan qani,nanu ana s~ɕki mis~ɕuw qani na ɣa,qalaŋ mjan ɣa,jas~ɕa qa muja qaraŋ maħa i s~ɕqjnux i ɣoju neŋ qani ɣa,nanu qa muja qaraŋ. . os~ɕa s~ɕqu qalaŋ**** qalaŋ mjan qani ɣa,ʦ~ʨjan maki i tunux s~ɕon maħa lljuŋ mniβuʔ qani,nanu jas~ɕa i kmujit s~ɕu turuj kaħul i ħoɣan ɣa kaħul ħeʦ~ʨi mwaħ ɣa,s~ɕi ɣlux i s~ɕon maħa s~ɕjaw lljuŋ i mniβuʔ qani,nanu s~ɕi prkjas~ɕ prkjas~ɕ ro,mwaħ lmwan laro,prkjas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕkikun lɣa,jas~ɕa mwaħ pjanaħ la.ana ɣa s~ɕajiŋ qara tuqij nja ɣa,mjuqu s~ɕu mus~ɕa lɣa,pħtux s~ɕu tojen ro ini ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕu ***ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux qutux pekus~ɕ s~ɕon naħa ɣa,wa prkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux tuqij ɣa,wa kja tojen ɣa,ro mwaħ laɣa,te tħβu s~ɕon naħa roβa ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux qutux tuqij lojiwa tqara loji wal *** la,nanu jas~ɕa minʔuqu s~ɕu mlux tuqij qas~ɕa laɣa,ijat s~ɕu teħok pjanan la. s~ɕami qalaŋ pjanan qani ħuja ɣa,βaħaw ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕon maħa i s~ɕuru βalaj rɣjax ɣa,pijux βalaj s~ɕon maħa i βlaq ʦ~ʨħalan ɣa,ro βalaq najan uji,pira maħa s~ɕami qalaŋ pjanan qani ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux qutux s~ɕon maħa quri s~ɕqaβu,quri s~ɕqaβu qas~ɕa ħija ɣa,βaɣan ro kmis~ɕan ro tmaŋu aβaw ro ħoqan aβaw ɣa,ini ptnaq qwara kako nja ɣa,βlaq βalaj ktan ɣa,quriʔ s~ɕqaβu qas~ɕa ħija ɣa,tariŋ s~ɕraral ɣa,jas~ɕa niqan njan i ɣalan mjan i quilħ ɣa,quilħ ħas~ɕa ɣa,mnβaŋ s~ɕo njan ɣa*****,nanu s~ɕraral ɣa,jas~ɕa ɣalan mjamn quliħ,ro qalaŋ mjan ħas~ɕa ɣa,maki βaluŋ uji ɣa,maki s~ɕon maħa qaliŋ s~ɕon njan ɣa,nanu ʦ~ʨjux qutux s~ɕon ****,ʦ~ʨjux qutux**ɣa,okeq mus~ɕa maŋaj qa i qaliŋ,ro qalaŋ mjan ħas~ɕa ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux s~ɕon maħa mqaβu n ptunux ʦ~ʨjux kja uji,βlaq βalaj ktan ***qas~ɕa aj,ana ɣa mwani ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕħtux i kens~ɕexu ɣa,njux s~ɕħtuj maħa ta s~ɕaj nqa i pʦ~ʨjaqiħ i *** qas~ɕa,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa,ini βaqij mus~ɕa ħaja,ro qutux loji ħapa βalaj ɣa i**nja lɣa,qanraŋ qani ro,qalaŋ pjanan qani ɣa,ita tajwan qani ɣa,s~ɕi s~ɕaj ma ħopa βalaj qa **nja ɣa,mmijan qanraŋ qani,nanu mus~ɕa s~ɕu qalaŋ pjanan qani ɣa,ktan s~ɕu qwara mtas~ɕjeq qwara i qanraŋ ɣa,βlaq βalaj ktan.kħmaj βalaj i kaħat ɣa. taj mkrajaʔ na pjanan ħjaʔ ɣa qalaŋ s~ɕkikun. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
